Patch Set 8:

This change is ready for review.

Patch Set 8:

This and future maintenance changes would be SO much cleaner if a property were added in the top-level pom.xml for the version number. Other repos have used the variable named "revision" for this.

I would DEFINITELY prefer that ALL of the 1.8.10-SNAPSHOT strings in the secondary pom.xml files were replaced with ${revision}. That way future revisions that only touch the dependencies can do the changes in ONLY the top-level pom.xml and the top-level version.properties files.

I'll let others weigh in with their thoughts. I won't give a score pro or minus yet, and am certainly not merging it as is until others have a chance to look at this too.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

Both com.google.code.gson : gson : 2.8.5 & org.springframework.security:spring-security-crypto:jar:5.5.4 need to be addressed as well

org.springframework.security:spring-security-crypto:jar:5.5.4 located at Module org.onap.dcaegen2.services.sdk.security.crypt:crypt-password:jar:1.8.8-SNAPSHOT

com.google.code.gson:gson:jar:2.8.5 located at Module org.onap.dcaegen2.services.sdk.standardization:api-custom-header:jar:1.8.8-SNAPSHOT

Patch Set 8:

Suggestion by Tony will be good to be incorporated as that simplify future updates/version changes, pls incorporate it.

and

[INFO] +- org.slf4j:slf4j-api:jar:1.7.25:compile
[INFO] +- com.google.code.gson:gson:jar:2.9.0:compile
